featured.title: Cohub
featured.description: Desktop collaboration tool built on Excalidraw. Real-time visual design with multi-view tabs, AI terminal, and board management.
featured.overview:
Cohub extends Excalidraw with a production Electron shell — multi-view architecture, typed IPC channels, and a custom Vite plugin for the Excalidraw submodule.

Monorepo with packages for the app shell, SQLite data layer, shared utilities, auth/onboarding, and a dashboard.

featured.title: Tassku
featured.description: Cross-platform task manager for Web, Android, iOS, and Desktop. Kotlin Multiplatform shared logic, React web frontend, Ktor API with PostgreSQL.
featured.overview:
Kotlin Multiplatform shares models, repositories, and sync across all platforms. Ktor backend with Exposed ORM and Flyway migrations. Compose Multiplatform for native UI.

Terraform-managed GCP infrastructure with Docker multi-stage builds.

featured.title: Aluna
featured.description: Pet health ecosystem — mobile app for owners and web-based vet practice management. Shared Kotlin Multiplatform backend.

small.title: Aluna Web
small.description: Marketing site for Aluna pet health platform. Theme system with OS preference detection and design tokens.

small.title: Tassku Web
small.description: Marketing site for Tassku. Technical aesthetic inspired by Obsidian and Vercel with CSS Modules.

small.title: cohub.space
small.description: Website for the Cohub collaboration platform. Product showcase and download links.

small.title: ConceptGen
small.description: Concept art generation with attribute-specific LoRA adapters on SDXL. Per-attribute perceptual losses for color, lighting, and composition.

small.title: FiLM-Conditioned CVAE for CD-FSL
small.description: Domain-aware feature hallucination via FiLM-conditioned VAE on frozen DINOv2 features for cross-domain few-shot classification.
small.overview:
Lightweight CVAE (~100K params) generating synthetic DINOv2 ViT-B/14 features conditioned on class identity and domain style descriptors via FiLM layers. Trained with a 4-term composite loss (reconstruction, KL, multi-scale MMD, prototype consistency). Evaluated on the BSCD-FSL benchmark across CropDisease, EuroSAT, ISIC, and ChestX domains.

Full ablation suite, EMD-based domain gap analysis, and t-SNE visualisations.
